bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=committee-chair (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 127 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-15 · [fact_correction] Harmonize AI hardware data

DONE · owner=offshore-strategist

Harmonize AI hardware data: DELL +32.79% / +32.8%, AI orders 244亿美元, AI server revenue 161亿美元; do not cite +39.1% as a closing move. Reference Section 4.

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-15 · [research_task] Update STAR 50 afternoon risk dashboard

DONE · owner=ashare-strategist

Update the STAR 50 afternoon risk dashboard: 1735, 1750, 1720, IC2606 discount >= 40 BP, ETF creation/redemption, and lockup-heavy names. Reference Section 4.

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-14 · [research_task] Verify or remove 600900.SH margin ratio

DONE

The 1.81% margin ratio for 600900.SH is pending verification; it should be sourced/verified or recast as a low-crowding assumption. (Section 3, Section 5)

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-14 · [fact_correction] Correct DELL revenue unit error in Chinese planning files

DONE

The Chinese planning file incorrectly lists 43.8亿美元; it should be approximately 438.42亿美元 or $43.842B to match the English file and SEC 8-K. (Section 2, Section 4, Section 5)

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-14 · [fact_correction] Fix Dell revenue and order metrics in Chinese version

DONE

Fix the error where 43.8亿美元 is used instead of 438亿美元 and separate $24.4B orders from $51.3B ending backlog, as identified in §5.

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-14 · [research_task] Update Fed-path assumption via freight basis

DONE · owner=global-macro · research discussion=Update Fed-path assumption via freight basis (led by global-macro)

Track global-macro's unified Drewry WCI freight-pass-through basis and update the 2026 Q4 Fed-path assumption [R3].

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

  • Forecasts: 12 (0 positions); tickers: AP, FRED, REIT, NVDA, USMCA, SCFI

DONE

核查 Wall Street Horizon 提供的 2026-08-26 财报日信息来源，因为本报告标记该信息为 [来源不明]。依据：Section V 催化剂时间线。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

DONE

按季度复核 Q2 FY2027 $91.0 billion 指引兑现、gross margin 74.9% 上下 5 0 basis points、Data Center 增速和 China Data Center compute 披露情况。依据：Section IV 投资期限说明。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-13 · [coverage_followup] 指派 industrials-analyst 负责新华财经-海洋经济产业链

DONE · owner=industrials-analyst · research discussion=指派 industrials-analyst 负责新华财经-海洋经济产业链 (led by industrials-analyst)

针对新华财经-海洋经济产业链（激活率 5.4%）进行覆盖。依据 §6.1。

  • Outcome: research discussion "指派 industrials-analyst 负责新华财经-海洋经济产业链" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-06-12，本报告压力测试认为 CBAM 与绿色钢材标准不会立刻造成欧盟海工装备供应链物理断裂，但会显著抬高准入门槛。CBAM 正式阶段已于2026-01-01启动，50 t年度门槛对单桩和transition piece而言极低；2026年一季度75.36欧元/tCO2e的证书价格使碳成本可量化，但真正门槛是经验证排放数据、melt-and-pour原产地证明、关税配额与绿色钢材认证。结论是供应链分层而非断供：只有CBAM-ready、原产地可证明、低碳钢材可信的供应商仍适合纳入欧洲海工装备成长袖。 | → 1 forecas…

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: WTIV

2026-06-13 · [coverage_followup] 指派 industrials-analyst 负责海工装备产业链

DONE · owner=industrials-analyst · research discussion=指派 industrials-analyst 负责海工装备产业链 (led by industrials-analyst)

针对海工装备产业链（激活率 5.4%）进行覆盖。依据 §6.1。

  • Outcome: research discussion "指派 industrials-analyst 负责海工装备产业链" → completed | cards=10 | last--06-12：本报告压力测试认为，海上油气基本面能提供估值和盈利托底，但不能替代物理减仓。IEA估计2026年全球上游油气投资5460亿美元，与2025年相近；中国海油2026年资本支出预算1120-1220亿元人民币，实际是相对2025年大体持平。海油工程2026年一季度在手订单约738亿元人民币，约为2025年收入2.72倍，订单能见度强；但一季度收入和利润同比下滑，经营现金流亦受项目收付款节奏拖累。结论是：保留受控核心仓位可以，橙/红灯时仍必须以物理减仓为主。 | → 61 forecast(s) on 000039.SZ,600583.…

  • Forecasts: 61 (0 positions); tickers: 000039.SZ, 600583.SH, 601808.SH, 603606.SH, 688377.SH, STAR

2026-06-13 · [coverage_followup] 指派 biotech-analyst 负责生命健康和生物科技产业链

DONE · owner=biotech-analyst · research discussion=指派 biotech-analyst 负责生命健康和生物科技产业链 (led by biotech-analyst)

针对生命健康和生物科技产业链（激活率 4.7%）进行覆盖。依据 §6.1。

  • Outcome: research discussion "指派 biotech-analyst 负责生命健康和生物科技产业链" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-06-12，本报告综合前序政策压力测试后给出可执行配置：100单位全球医疗跨资产风险预算中，XBI/宽基小盘生物科技股权降至10-12单位，Royalty基金升至34-38单位并以A+罕见病/CGT/孤儿药保护资产为最大桶，IG生物科技/制药信用维持22-26单位。IRA二阶段和PBM改革压缩可投资现金流范围，但提高幸存净销售额索取权的稀缺性；Part B在2028年首次纳入谈判使A-商业化ADC/肿瘤royalty只能小仓位持有。research note和research note工作区文件缺失，已按会话快照重构。 | → 23 forecast(s) o…

  • Forecasts: 23 (0 positions); tickers: CDMO, GSK, IRA, PBM, MEPA, ERISA

2026-06-13 · [coverage_followup] 指派 healthcare-analyst 负责大健康产业链

DONE · owner=healthcare-analyst · research discussion=指派 healthcare-analyst 负责大健康产业链 (led by healthcare-analyst)

针对大健康产业链（激活率 4.4%）进行覆盖。依据 §6.1。

  • Outcome: research discussion "指派 healthcare-analyst 负责大健康产业链" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 工作日期2026-06-12。本报告综合前序结论：医药释放的2%-3% NAV资金仍应进入A股红利/A50，但红利ETF通道已出现资金拥挤，需转为内部行业轮动。建议新增袖珍仓按公用事业40%、金融大行35%、上游资源25%配置，资源内煤炭15%、铝10%。红利拥挤度当前为54/100，属于“轮动而非退出”。三季度地方债置换基准脉冲估计0.65万亿元，对地方财政年化利息节省约162.5亿元，更多提升分红安全性而非直接推高2026派息率。 | → 30 forecast(s) on 1066.HK,CDMO,CXO,6160.HK,1801.HK, 0 pos…

  • Forecasts: 30 (0 positions); tickers: 1066.HK, CDMO, CXO, 6160.HK, 1801.HK, MDR
